title: GeotetraArmor Fork
description: this project is a fork of yiran1457 geotetraarmor addon, with some changes and bug fixes.
body:
This is a fork of the GeoTetraArmor mod, originally created by yi_ran (yiran1457). This version focuses on stability fixes and expanding the original content.

🛠️ What has been fixed?
The original mod was experiencing stability issues. In this fork, I have addressed:

Damage Crashes: Fixed the critical issue where the game would crash upon taking damage while wearing certain armor pieces.

General Stability: Improved code handling to prevent unexpected shutdowns during gameplay.

✨ New Content
Beyond fixes, I've added new features to enhance your Tetra experience:

New Armor Type: Added light armor to contrast with the heavy armor.

More Honings: Expanded the honing options, giving you more ways to specialize and upgrade your gear.

🙏 Credits & Licensing
Original Mod: [GeoTetraArmor](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geotetraarmor)

License: This fork is distributed under the GNU Lesser General Public License v3 (LGPLv3).

As per the license, this project is open-source, and I provide this version to keep the community's experience smooth and bug-free.

💬 Feedback & Suggestions
This is a work in progress! I am actively looking for feedback to improve the mod.

Did you find a bug?

Do you have a suggestion for a new honing or armor part?

Please let me know in the comments or open an issue on the repository. Your input is essential to making this the best bridge between Tetra and GeckoLib!
